title: The Ethereal John (Aether Addon)
description: The formidable presence of The John transcends the earthly realm, venturing into the ethereal expanse beyond the clouds known as the Aether. Known as The Ethereal John, lurking and observing from the shadowed recesses of this realm.
body:
![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/780323313922736148/1119382215403503707/Ethereal_John_Promo.png)
The formidable presence of The John transcends the earthly realm, venturing into the ethereal expanse beyond the clouds known as the Aether. Known as The Ethereal John, lurking and observing from the shadowed recesses of this realm. In the depths where darkness prevails and light is absent, The Ethereal John may materialize, defying the notion that only benevolence exists in heavenly domains. Even within the realms of ethereal bliss, monsters can be still found in heaven.

This mod has no connection to the Aethers lore, or the lore of the John Mod Reborns. This is separate and has no connection. It's just for fun!

# The Ethereal John
The Ethereal John is known to manifest solely in the most darkest recesses of the Aether. These ethereal depths exist below a light level of 3, concealed within only in caves. The Ethereal John inflicts 8 points of damage upon its adversaries, boasting an impressive 25 hearts (50 health). A perilous encounter with this entity carries a 50 percent chance of afflicting the victim with blindness for 3 seconds upon each attack.

## Ethereal Gem & Ethereal Sword
Upon vanquishing the Ethereal John, there is a 50 percent chance of obtaining the coveted Ethereal Gem. The combination of two such gems, grants the creation of the illustrious Ethereal Sword. This remarkable blade has the "Unborn Tone" enchantment, which harmoniously resonates with the striking of each blow, emitting ethereal synth piano keys. However they synchronize with the rhythm of each blow when engaging the Ethereal John. Furthermore, the Ethereal Sword possesses the unique ability to afflict the Ethereal John with Weakness.

* Anymore about the mod please visit the [Github Wiki](https://github.com/Legodamen/JohnModEthereal/wiki)
* Any issues with the mod please visit [Github Issue Tracker](https://github.com/Legodamen/JohnModEthereal/issues)

# Video

## Credits:
Of course, this wouldn't be possible without the original mod from beta 1.8 by Kurtss - [Minecraft Forum Page](https://www.minecraftforum.net/forums/mapping-and-modding-java-edition/minecraft-mods/1277648-1-8-1-john-v1-2)

The SCMowns 2012 recreation. Who also gave me permission to post the mod - [Planet Minecraft Page](https://legacy.curseforge.com/linkout?remoteUrl=https%253a%252f%252fwww.planetminecraft.com%252fmod%252f125-john-v10-reborned---working-on-version-2%252f) - 
[Minecraft Forum Page](https://www.minecraftforum.net/forums/mapping-and-modding-java-edition/minecraft-mods/1283649-1-6-4-smp-john-v3-2-revived-mega-giant-john-baby)

And the John Mod Resurrected By Notvirgen - [Curse forge page](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/john-mod-resurrected)

Textures also got influence from the 2022 The Return of John texture pack by Pixperfect - [Planet Minecraft Link](https://legacy.curseforge.com/linkout?remoteUrl=https%253a%252f%252fwww.planetminecraft.com%252ftexture-pack%252fthe-return-of-john-1-19-warden-replacement-pixperfect%252f)

Also, any assets was used from the [Aether Mod](https://aether.wiki.gg/wiki/Aether_Wiki), and they said they're fine with any addons being made


### Software
* Models Made with [Blockbench](https://www.blockbench.net)
* And "Coding" made with [MCreator](https://mcreator.net)

If you are wondering, the Shaders I use in any screenshots, it is[ Complementary Shaders v4.2.2](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/customization/complementary-shaders)

## Warning! The only official places to find the mod is on:
[Curse Forge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-ethereal-john-aether-addon), [Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/mod/the-john-mod-reborn/), and Modrinth.

Be careful where you go, don't trust sites like 9Minecraft.
